message:
feat(ui): Add comprehensive button system, sidebar styling, and micro-interactions

Major UI polish update adding ~600 lines of CSS for desktop experience:

BUTTON SYSTEM (.btn):
- Base button with hover, active, focus-visible, and disabled states
- Variants: .btn-primary (cyan), .btn-ghost (transparent), .btn.compact
- Active toggle state: .btn.active with cyan highlight
- Smooth transitions using design system timing variables
- Transform scale(0.97) on active for tactile feedback

ANALYSIS SIDEBAR:
- Full styling for .analysis-sidebar and .analysis-sidebar--collapsed
- Sidebar header with collapse/expand buttons
- Category headers with chevron rotation on expand
- Tool buttons with hover translateX(2px) micro-animation
- Keyboard shortcut badges (.tool-shortcut) with monospace font
- Level badges (.category-level--intermediate, .category-level--power)
- Footer help button with dashed border

QUICK STATS BAR:
- Flexbox layout with stat labels and values
- Highlight variant for important values (--highlight)
- Uppercase labels with letter-spacing

SETTINGS OVERLAY:
- Section styling with elevated background
- Row layout with label, description, and action areas
- Select inputs with focus ring styling
- Footer with border separator

MICRO-INTERACTIONS:
- Global :focus-visible with cyan ring (0 0 0 4px)
- Link hover transitions to primary color
- Input/select/textarea focus animations
- Panel hover border lightening
- Kbd element styling with shadow
- Badge hover scale(1.02)
- Custom scrollbar styling for webkit
- ::selection highlight with cyan background

PERFORMANCE CSS:
- contain: content for panels/cards/overlays
- will-change hints for animated elements
- @media (prefers-reduced-motion) disables all animations
- @media (prefers-contrast: high) adjusts border/text colors

MOBILE FIXES (desktop-ui.css, mobile-overrides.css):
- Quick-stats CSS ordering fix (base styles before media queries)
- Checkbox touch target fix: removed pseudo-element approach that doesn't
  work on replaced elements, now relies on label click propagation
- Added cursor:pointer and accent-color for better mobile UX

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
